creator: swhetzel@gmail.com
text:
Currently, the security/vscan port is only for the i386 architecture.  If you try to install on FreeBSD/amd64, the ports infrastructure errors with that the port is only for Freebsd/i386.

Fix: 

Apply the patch in the following email:
How-To-Repeat: Try to install on the port on a FreeBSD/amd64 system.
